title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
